page: Microsoft Azure D8ds_v5 is a general-purpose virtual machine instance belonging to the DDSv5 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel Xeon 8370C processor with a base clock speed of 2.8 GHz. The instance is configured with 8 dedicated virtual CPUs mapped from 4 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled, providing 2 threads per core. It is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. Cache resources include 48 KB of L1d cache, 1 MB of L2 cache, and 48 MB of L3 cache.

This instance includes 307 GB of local SSD storage and is premium storage capable, allowing for high-performance disk configurations. It does not feature any GPU accelerators. The hardware supports advanced instruction sets, including AVX, AVX-512 Foundation, and AVX-512 Vector Neural Network Instructions, alongside cryptographic acceleration via AES, VAES, and SHA extensions. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are bundled with this instance.

Benchmark evaluations place the D8ds_v5 consistently in the average performance tier across most compute, memory, and storage metrics. Single-core stress-ng performance registers at 1898.99, while multi-core performance reaches 7760.14. Memory bandwidth tests show 417.12 GB/sec for cached small-block reads and 58.17 GB/sec for uncached large-block reads. Database operations score 4027.23 on PassMark, and Redis SET operations achieve 8.01 million operations per second. However, multi-threaded bzip3 decompression is a relative weak point, scoring in the bottom 25% tier with 31.99 GB/sec. This resource profile is suitable for general-purpose workloads, static web serving, software compilation, and database operations.
description: Microsoft Azure D8ds_v5 is a general-purpose virtual machine instance from the DDSv5 family, powered by an Intel Xeon 8370C processor running at 2.8 GHz. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs across 4 physical cores, 32.0 GB of RAM, and 307 GB of local SSD storage. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, the instance supports AVX-512 and cryptographic acceleration. Performance benchmarks consistently place this server in the average tier, with a single-core Geekbench score of 1637.0 and a multi-core score of 6053.0. It delivers 12.1 GB/sec of static web serving throughput and 8.01 million Redis SET operations per second. While multi-threaded bzip3 decompression is a relative bottleneck, the overall balanced compute-to-memory ratio and local storage capability make it highly suitable for general-purpose applications, software compilation, web serving, and database operations.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D8ds_v5 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 8 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 32 GB of RAM, and 307 GB of local SSD storage, delivering balanced performance for databases and web serving.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D8ds_v5 is an 8-vCPU general-purpose instance with 32 GB RAM and 307 GB local storage, optimized for databases and web serving.
tagline: A balanced x86_64 virtual machine with dedicated Intel Xeon processors, local SSD storage, and versatile general-purpose performance.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 8370C processor with 8 dedicated vCPUs and 32 GB RAM
Includes 307 GB of local SSD storage with premium storage capability
Supports AVX-512 and cryptographic hardware acceleration
Delivers 12.1 GB/sec static web serving throughput
Well-suited for general-purpose applications, databases, and software compilation
